title: thottea tomentosa var. lanuginosa
intro: Thottea tomentosa var. lanuginosa, also known as the hairy thottea, is a plant species within the family Gesneriaceae, native to the Western Ghats in India. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Thottea tomentosa var. lanuginosa include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to aid in the management of gastrointestinal problems. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, often used in traditional Indian medicine, Ayurveda, to treat various ailments.
